channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Mulls Deployment of HMS Duncan to Enhance Security at RAF Akrotiri in Cyprus
item.description: The UK government is considering sending a Royal Navy warship, potentially the HMS Duncan, to the Mediterranean to bolster security around RAF Akrotiri in Cyprus. This comes after criticism from the C...

item.title: South African Navy Uses Warships for Diplomacy and International Relations
item.description: In January 2026, South Africa hosted a naval exercise dubbed 'Will for Peace' that involved warships from several nations, including China, Russia, UAE, Iran, and South Africa itself. The exercise sti...

item.title: Deputy National Commissioner Mosikili expresses confusion over Mchunu's directive to disband PKTT
item.description: Deputy National Commissioner of Police, Lieutenant-General Tebello Mosikili, revealed her surprise and confusion over the directive issued by suspended Police Minister Senzo Mchunu to disband the Poli...

item.title: Trump hints at long US-Iran conflict after sixth US death in the Gulf
item.description: As the conflict between the United States and Iran intensifies, President Donald Trump has warned that the US is prepared for a prolonged war, stating that the country has an 'unlimited' supply of wea...

item.title: Liberal Party's internal review reveals key failures in disastrous 2025 election campaign
item.description: A leaked internal review of the Liberal Party's 2025 election campaign has exposed significant errors that contributed to their worst electoral performance. The report identifies former opposition lea...

item.title: Montreal Museum Highlights Quebec Designers and Artists
item.description: Since its opening in the fall, the Decorative Arts and Design Pavilion at the Montreal Museum of Fine Arts has showcased an impressive collection of over 800 objects, with a distinct emphasis on Quebe...

item.title: Drought Worsens in 23 Counties, Food Shortages and Livestock Losses Rising
item.description: Kenya is currently grappling with worsening drought affecting twenty-three counties, mostly in the ASAL regions. Mandera has been hit the hardest, with Turkana, Wajir, Garissa, Tana River, Kilifi, Kwa...

item.title: Rapper Ghetts faces jail after fatal hit-and-run incident that killed student Yubin Tamang
item.description: The mother of Yubin Tamang, a 20-year-old student from Nepal who died after being struck by a car driven by rapper Ghetts, has spoken of her 'extreme pain' and the 'unimaginable loss' of losing her on...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Early Presidential Bid: Will She Break the Trend?
item.description: In a bold move, Vice President Sara Duterte has announced her intention to run for president in the 2028 elections. This decision follows a familiar pattern in Philippine politics, where many vice pre...

item.title: Leaked Police Memo Reveals Tenure Extension Deal Behind Sowore’s Passport Seizure
item.description: A confidential memo from January 2025 has leaked, revealing how former Deputy Inspector-General of Police (DIG), Dasuki Galadanchi, sought a two-year tenure extension, which allegedly depended on his ...

item.title: Delays and complications in fixing Perth’s Malcolm Street Bridge
item.description: The $1.3 million Malcolm Street Bridge barrier upgrade in Perth has faced ongoing delays, with work now scheduled to be completed in April 2026. Initially begun in February 2024, the project has encou...

item.title: Nigerian Photographer Kola Onifoto Dies in Fatal Motorcycle Accident
item.description: Kola Onifoto, a renowned Nigerian photographer and biker, has tragically passed away following a motorcycle accident in Lagos. Onifoto, 35, was a former military officer and had recently fulfilled a l...

item.title: Bad Bunny’s Super Bowl reference to Canada: A cultural and historical statement
item.description: Bad Bunny's performance during the Super Bowl halftime show made waves when he mentioned 'Canadá' alongside several other countries in the Americas. This moment resonated with the Latin American, Lati...

item.title: Canada concerned over new Australian tax on foreign pension fund investments
item.description: Canada’s Finance Minister François-Philippe Champagne has expressed concerns over a new tax proposed by the Albanese government, which could significantly impact foreign investment in Australia. The g...

item.title: Exiled Iranian Opposes Both US-Israeli Attack and Iranian Regime
item.description: In an interview with Middle East Eye, Behrouz Farahani, a political analyst in exile and critic of the Islamic Republic of Iran, strongly condemned the US and Israeli military actions against Iran. Fa...

item.title: North Bengal Floods Highlight the Impact of Human Actions and Climate Change
item.description: In October 2025, North Bengal faced a devastating flood that wreaked havoc across districts like Darjeeling, Jalpaiguri, and Alipurduar. A record rainfall of over 300 mm in just 12 hours triggered wid...

item.title: House Panel Continues Impeachment Discussions Against VP Sara Duterte
item.description: On March 3, 2026, the impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte continued in the House of Representatives. Lawmakers deliberated whether the red flags raised by the Commission on Aud...

item.title: Trump's Middle East Strategy: A Risky Path to Instability and Conflict
item.description: The article critiques Donald Trump’s approach to the Middle East, particularly his stance on Iran. It highlights his contradictory statements and the lack of clear strategy in the current US-Israel co...

item.title: Carrie Underwood responds to 'American Idol' boos amid political speculation
item.description: Carrie Underwood, the country music superstar and judge on ‘American Idol,’ has remained unapologetic despite receiving boos from the audience during a recent episode. The backlash occurred after she ...

item.title: Iran Conflict Challenges UK's Inflation Forecast
item.description: The ongoing war in Iran has dramatically impacted global energy markets, with wholesale gas prices in the UK surging. This rise is particularly alarming because gas prices are a key determinant of ele...
